children.text: World hunger is a bad thing. 50% of people are hungry some or all of the time.
You have passed your first test! Climb up the pole to receive your award.
Time for your next challenge! this person always has enough to eat!
Up we go, to the next challenge!
Only 30% of people have enough to eat! Lucky for him!
Okay, that was weird. This next person is undernourished! Save him by feeding him spikes and blocks!
You hero! 20% of people are undernourished, but you helped him! #worldhungerprevention
It's time for your final challenge, but be quick! This man is dying of starvation! Save his life!
Slide the bouncer floor out to let the blocks fall down!
Welcome to the bouncer party! Wait, you're not a bouncer? Never mind. Do some playing. And yikes, there's a lot of mist!
1% of people are dying from starvation. You saved an elderly man in his 60s' life! You have basically completed the level! Let's try to prevent world hunger!
Should we prevent world hunger? Up for no, down for yes.
Thank you for visiting the bouncer party!
HOW THE BLOCK DID YOU GET HERE?!!?
There's also a neat thing called food bank! Donating one dollar feeds two people.
With more farmers, more crops will grow. If we supply farmers with the tools they need, we would have more food. Some countries, such as Yemen, need food, so farmers could help them.
A lot of food is wasted. If less food is wasted, there would be more food.
